rows.prompt:
Analyze this image for an automatic photo selection system (A-cut).

Return exactly one valid JSON object.
- No markdown
- No code fences
- No commentary before or after the JSON
- No field labels inside the values
- Use double-quoted JSON keys

Use this exact schema:
{"short_reason": "...", "detailed_reason": "...", "comparison_reason": "...", "tags": ["..."], "confidence": null}

Rules:
- short_reason: one short sentence, 8 to 18 words
- detailed_reason: 1 to 2 short sentences grounded in visible image content
- comparison_reason: 1 short sentence about why this image ranks better or worse than nearby alternatives; use null if unsupported
- tags: JSON array with 0 to 4 short lowercase cue labels; use [] if none
- confidence: number from 0 to 1, or null
- If you are unsure, use null or [] rather than extra prose
- Output JSON only

Image Metadata:
- Rank: 1
- Status: Rejected
- Final Score After Rerank: 0.5970288352588355
- Aesthetic Score: 0.5674366182088851
- Technical Score: 0.6074121323585511
- Composition Tags: background cleanliness, lighting, composition
- Photo Type Mode: N/A
- Baseline Selector Reason: Composition carried this frame into the A-cut, helped by technical quality.
